metadata.name: Layering Core Pack
metadata.summary: Enforce UI/App/Data layering boundaries and keep data boundaries within healthy sizes.

rules.description: UI layer modules must not import directly from the data layer.
rules.sql:
SELECT ie.source_boundary AS source_boundary, ie.target_name AS target_name, ie.usage_count AS usage_count
FROM import_edges AS ie
WHERE ie.run_id = %(run_id)s
  AND (ie.source_boundary LIKE %(source_boundary_0)s ESCAPE '\\')
  AND (ie.target_name LIKE %(target_name_1)s ESCAPE '\\')

autofix.message: Route data access through an app/service facade.

rules.description: App boundaries should not depend on more than 20 distinct data modules.
rules.sql:
SELECT ie.source_boundary AS source_boundary, ie.target_name AS target_name, ie.usage_count AS usage_count
FROM import_edges AS ie
WHERE ie.run_id = %(run_id)s
  AND (ie.source_boundary LIKE %(source_boundary_0)s ESCAPE '\\')
  AND (ie.target_name LIKE %(target_name_1)s ESCAPE '\\')

predicate.message: Too many data imports from app boundary.

rules.description: Data boundaries should stay below 15k SLOC to keep ownership manageable.
rules.sql:
SELECT bs.boundary AS boundary, bs.module_count AS module_count, bs.total_sloc AS total_sloc, bs.total_functions AS total_functions, bs.total_classes AS total_classes
FROM boundary_stats AS bs
WHERE bs.run_id = %(run_id)s
  AND (bs.boundary LIKE %(boundary_0)s ESCAPE '\\')
